summary: Verified assist dialog functionality in both Classic and Advanced modes. All 8 test cases passed - assist dialog appears correctly after made 2PT and 3PT baskets, shows only players on floor (excluding scorer), and 'No Assist' button works correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing games: test-advanced-game-001 (Advanced mode) and 2d43db80-dc75-4b8c-a1c6-b1cc4115c97e (Classic mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assist dialog functionality is fully working in both Classic and Advanced modes. Test games used: Advanced mode (test-advanced-game-001) and Classic mode (2d43db80-dc75-4b8c-a1c6-b1cc4115c97e).

classic_mode_2pt_assist_dialog.description: After clicking 2PT button and MAKE, assist dialog appears with players on floor (excluding scorer)

classic_mode_3pt_assist_dialog.description: After clicking 3PT button and MAKE, assist dialog appears with players on floor (excluding scorer)

classic_mode_no_assist_button.description: 'No Assist (Unassisted)' button closes dialog without recording assist

classic_mode_select_assister.description: Selecting an assister from the dialog records the assist stat and closes dialog

advanced_mode_2pt_assist_dialog.description: After 2PT Shot -> Player Select -> MADE, assist dialog appears with players on floor (excluding scorer)

advanced_mode_3pt_assist_dialog.description: After 3PT Shot -> Player Select -> MADE, assist dialog appears with players on floor (excluding scorer)

advanced_mode_no_assist_button.description: 'No Assist (Unassisted)' button closes dialog without recording assist

advanced_mode_select_assister.description: Selecting an assister from the dialog records the assist stat and closes dialog

test_flow: 3. Test Advanced Mode 2PT: Click '2PT Shot' -> Select player #11 -> Click 'MADE' -> Verify assist dialog appears with players #12, #13, #14, #15 (excluding scorer #11)
4. Test Advanced Mode 3PT: Click '3PT Shot' -> Select player #1 -> Click 'MADE' -> Verify assist dialog appears with players #2, #3, #4, #5 (excluding scorer #1)
5. Test Advanced Mode assister selection: Select player #2 as assister -> Dialog closes, assist recorded
6. Navigate to Basketball -> Classic game (Test Home Team vs Test Away Team)
7. Test Classic Mode 2PT: Click Anthony Davis's '2PT' button -> Click 'MAKE' -> Verify assist dialog appears with teammates (excluding Anthony Davis)
8. Test Classic Mode 3PT: Click '3PT' button -> Click 'MAKE' -> Verify assist dialog appears
9. Test Classic Mode assister selection: Select a teammate -> Dialog closes, assist recorded
10. Test Classic Mode 'No Assist': Click '2PT' -> 'MAKE' -> 'No Assist' -> Dialog closes without recording assist

code_verification.LiveGame.jsx_lines_1505-1523: AssistModal correctly filters teammates to only players on floor (onFloor.includes(p.id)) and excludes scorer (p.id !== assistScorer?.id)
code_verification.AdvancedLiveGame.jsx_lines_1350-1403: AssistDialog correctly filters eligiblePlayers to only players on floor and excludes scorer (madeBasketPlayer?.id)
